evals.prompt: Use this local Mandarin podcast audio to make a full Markdown transcript. I want it to read like an article, no timestamps, no music lyrics.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown transcript in the same folder with headings, paragraphs, punctuation, no timestamp markers, and no intro music lyrics.

evals.prompt: Transcribe this podcast into Markdown and make sure headings do not split paragraphs or setup sentences from the sections they introduce.
evals.expected_output: A full article-style Markdown transcript whose heading boundaries keep setup sentences with the sections they introduce, with temporary ASR files cleaned up.

evals.prompt: Here is an Apple Podcasts episode link. Download the audio and create an article-style transcript in the target folder.
evals.expected_output: The agent resolves the RSS feed/audio enclosure, downloads the audio, extracts metadata/chapters/glossary terms, creates or reuses a durable ASR cache, then produces a full article-style transcript.

evals.prompt: Retry formatting this podcast transcript from its existing ASR cache. Do not run Whisper again.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses the cached ASR JSON/metadata as the source, performs only the rough Markdown and article-style editorial passes, and leaves the durable cache files in place.
